description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow to publish a Python distribution to PyPI. The workflow should trigger on push events with tags matching v*.*.*. It should have two jobs: one to build the distribution and another to publish it to PyPI if the push event is a tag. The build job should check out the code, set up Python 3.x, install build, and create a binary wheel and source tarball. The publish job should download the distribution and publish it to PyPI using a trusted publishing method.
